title: euphorbia sanctae-catharinae
intro: Euphorbia sanctae-catharinae, also known as the African Milk Bush, is a succulent plant that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its latex, which contains a compound called succinic acid. The health benefits of Euphorbia sanctae-catharinae include its potential use as a diuretic, its anti-inflammatory properties, and its ability to aid in wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and is used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
